items.title: Mojtaba Khamenei’s absence signals shifting role for Iran leader

items.title: Trump Says Iran Ceasefire Over But Talks on Deal to Continue
items.summary:
President Donald Trump said the US would continue talks with Iran but considers the ceasefire between the countries to be over.
“The Islamic Republic of Iran has asked us to continue ‘talks.’ We have agreed to do so, but the United States has stated to them, in no uncertain terms, that the Cease Fire is OVER!,” Trump said Friday on social media. Trita Parsi, Executive Vice President at the Quincy
